unresolved: whether type-ahead filtering enters scope at all — this prototype informs, it does not decide
conclusion: 300 ms reads as broken — the pending marker is the only sign anything heard you. 100 ms with instant first keystroke feels immediate on this five-item list; minimum characters adds nothing at this scale.
